name: Ai Kisugi
description: Baby sister of the trio, Ai has a spunky, tomboyish personality and demeanor, and has a genius-level I.Q. and is particularly adept in mechanics, computer programming and engineering. She has built a wide array of gadgets to help her sisters in their heists. A typical teenager, she seems to be preoccupied a lot and dreams of falling in love. name: Ai Morishita
description: She uses polite language, but calls others by their first names and behaves in a quirky way, so she is treated as a unique individual. She is an excellent student with excellent academic and physical abilities, and is good at observation and analysis. She will not take action on her own unless she is interested, but she is intrigued by Ayanokoji's high level of ability.
